name: ROBERT HALF INC.
summary: Robert Half Inc. provides specialized talent solutions and business consulting services under the Robert Half and Protiviti brands. Services include contract and permanent placement of professionals in finance and accounting, technology, marketing and creative, legal, and administrative fields. Protiviti, a wholly owned subsidiary, offers consulting and managed solutions in regulatory compliance, finance, technology, operations, data, risk, and internal audit across more than 25 countries.

products.name: Contract Talent Solutions - Finance and Accounting
products.description: Contract engagement professionals in accounting, finance, and accounting operations for peak workloads and special projects.

products.name: Contract Talent Solutions - Technology
products.description: IT contract professionals and managed services including software development, networking, cloud, and security.

products.name: Contract Talent Solutions - Marketing and Creative
products.description: Creative, digital, marketing, advertising, and public relations contract professionals.

products.name: Contract Talent Solutions - Legal
products.description: Legal contract talent including attorneys and paralegal professionals.

products.name: Contract Talent Solutions - Administrative and Customer Support
products.description: Contract office and administrative personnel including executive assistants, receptionists, and customer service representatives.

products.name: Permanent Placement Talent Solutions
products.description: Full-time placement in finance, accounting, technology, marketing, creative, legal, and administrative fields; fees paid by employer.

products.name: Protiviti Consulting and Managed Solutions
products.description: Global consulting in regulatory compliance, finance, technology, operations, data, digital, legal, HR, governance, risk, and internal audit.

products.name: Protiviti Atlas
products.description: Proprietary enterprise AI platform developed by Protiviti; patent pending in the United States.

products.name: AI Candidate Matching Engine
products.description: Proprietary AI engine matching candidates to job listings and improving lead generation for talent solutions professionals.

partnerships.partner_name: Professional organizations in accounting, finance, technology, legal, and creative/marketing fields
partnerships.description: Endorsements and affiliations to support marketing and recruiting efforts.
Collaborative client engagements in over 25 countries through independently owned member firms.

partnerships.partner_name: Professional associations and complementary service and technology providers
partnerships.description: Broad partner ecosystem used by Protiviti for marketing capabilities and service delivery.
